hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.py$' && python3 -m ruff format "$f" && python3 -m ruff check --fix "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'index\.html$' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked: index.html is the tracker. Confirm with user before editing."}' || echo '{}'; }
